doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: fabricated
reason: The EEOC Compliance Manual does not contain a "Section 8" dedicated to age discrimination, and the text provided is a synthetic summary rather than an excerpt from an official government publication.
response_turn1:
